_comment: 4 CUAD categories, Indemnification removed due to mismatch between CUAD gold annotations and extracted clause definitions (discussed in paper).

categories.name: Governing Law
categories.description: The law governing the interpretation and enforcement of the contract.

categories.name: Termination for Convenience
categories.description: A party's right to terminate the contract without cause, typically with notice.

categories.name: Liability Cap
categories.description: A contractual limit on the amount or types of damages one party can recover from the other.

categories.name: IP Ownership Assignment
categories.description: Provisions specifying which party owns intellectual property created or used under the contract.
